# Transcrição: 19. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - IF YOU CAN'T NO ONE CAN

- **Fonte:** 19. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - IF YOU CAN'T NO ONE CAN
- **Duração:** 00:12
- **Idioma:** en

---

## [00:00 - 00:12]

You just heard, I don't think we can afford to do this. I can't even believe you said that. Now knock off the negative talk. If you can't do it, no one can. I need you to stand here and here.
